svg.text: Zuno SpeakX — Multi-Agent Lesson Generation Pipeline
Self-healing LangGraph agent system · generator → evaluator → router loops · two-lane evaluation · vision-audited image synthesis
AGENTIC CORE — LangGraph StateGraph · generator → evaluator → router, with self-healing retry loops
LLM JUDGE · tone · pedagogy ladder · safety (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
↻ regenerate — inject critique into error_log → next prompt
DET · child-safety whole-word scan · pedagogy ladder · STT
extract image needs · build render queue
⑥ Eval Scorer — Two-Lane Quality Gate
scores the finished matrix before any image quota is spent
↻ retry — inject visual critique · next — advance to next asset
guardrails: hard cutoff 50 iters · 429 quota → pending queue
26-col matrix + approved images + eval grade + per-node metrics → streamed back to UI
Every evaluator emits a structured critique.
It is written to error_log and injected into
the next generator prompt — the agent
regenerates until it passes or hits max_retries.
· exceptions → clean error event, partial save
· editable live from the admin panel
tokens · cost · latency · retries, per node.
Surfaced live in the process feed & output.
